title: Duplicate Previous Automation Action
excerpt: Creating automations on monday.com is incredibly powerful, but it can sometimes be time-consuming, especially when setting up repetitive actions. I propose a simple yet highly impactful feature: the ability to duplicate …

posts.author: shirozayas (Shiro Zayas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Creating automations on monday.com is incredibly powerful, but it can sometimes be time-consuming, especially when setting up repetitive actions. I propose a simple yet highly impactful feature: the ability to duplicate the previous action when building an automation recipe.

Currently, if you want to add several similar actions (e.g., changing multiple statuses, assigning multiple people), you have to go through the process of selecting each action type and its parameters individually every time.

Imagine this: After configuring an action in an automation, there’s a small “Duplicate” or “Add another similar action” button. Clicking this would instantly create a new action step, pre-populated with the settings of the immediately preceding action. Users could then quickly make minor adjustments to this duplicated action without starting from scratch.

This small addition would significantly streamline the automation creation process, making it faster and more intuitive, particularly for complex workflows that involve numerous similar steps. It’s a quality-of-life improvement that would save valuable time for many monday.com users.

Maybe something like this:
